message:
fix(node): Use singleFork to prevent worker crash on cleanup

Native addons can cause vitest worker processes to crash during
cleanup when using multiple forks. Using singleFork avoids this issue
while still allowing parallel test execution within a single process.

Also excluded logic-table-compiler.spec.js which requires metal0 build.

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,12 @@ export default defineConfig({
   test: {
     globals: true,
     testTimeout: 30000,
+    pool: 'forks',
+    poolOptions: {
+      forks: {
+        singleFork: true,
+      },
+    },
     include: ['test/**/*.spec.js', 'test/**/*.test.js'],
     exclude: [
       'test/basic.test.js',
@@ -12,7 +18,8 @@ export default defineConfig({
       'test/distinct.test.js',
       'test/types.test.js',
       'test/timestamp.test.js',
-    ], // Node.js native test runner files
+      'test/logic-table-compiler.spec.js', // Requires metal0 build
+    ],
     coverage: {
       provider: 'v8',
       reporter: ['text', 'json', 'html'],
